intent: Design STM32 HVAC fan driver firmware for 220V control with safety, timing and bench evidence.
acceptance_criteria: Compiler routes the intent toward embedded firmware or flags missing registry coverage.
Generated plan includes bench evidence and safety-oriented gates.
Runner captures blocker reason if bench evidence is missing.
nexus_integration_notes: Nexus runtime may need hardware-in-the-loop callback support later.
Evidence artifacts should support logs, measurements and firmware build outputs.
